title: Argentinian Garlic Toast
description: A simple yet flavorful toast recipe originating from Argentina, featuring a mixture of crushed garlic and toasted bread.
instructions: 2. Slice the crusty bread into 1-inch thick slices.
3. In a small bowl, crush the garlic cloves using a press or a microplane.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the crushed garlic and salt.
5. Drizzle the olive oil into the garlic mixture and stir to combine.
6. Place the bread slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Remove the bread from the oven and brush the garlic and olive oil mixture onto each slice.
